ptxt.intxrefpoff: Contact Coil Assembly Removal and Installation

attention2.ptxt: Turning contact coil with excessive force will break contact coil. Turn contact coil (2) with a light force while holding bottom of connector (1).

s1.ptxt: From the position of Step 3), turn contact coil clockwise to place connector at top position within one rotation.
Turn contact coil (2) two turns clockwise to place connector (1) at top position.

attention3.ptxt: If contact coil is equipped with indicator (3), check that orange roller (4) is visible in indicator as shown in figure after turning contact coil (2) two turns clockwise to place connector (1) at top position.
